title: Assembled Legendary Tooltips
description: A vanilla+ resource pack for the Legendary Tooltips mod
body:
## This resourcepack requires [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/atHH8NyV) mod to work
I must mention that this pack contains **modified** textures from other resourse packs:
- [Barely Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/xKCSsrSr)
- [Origin Realms - Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/CjZB9nf0)
- [Origin Realms - Legendary Tooltips DLC](https://modrinth.com/project/rhBvhyNN)
- [Modded Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/project/QjA6AyDh)

I just wanted to create a more vanilla friendly style than any of these options.

![showcase of tooltips for tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc411d1300f745dc9d56a8fb3d33034386c71fc8.png)
![showcase of tooltips for natural blocks and materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e17bca5bb867fc18e0a80c486bed22aa495b3a.png)
![showcase of tooltips for colored items and wood types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2da20b36ad6f2487ce565a894e6c527e274b98b.png)
![showcase of tooltips for boss items, magic and potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a9ec8bc93fadd8c395bb752be86759babfad872.png)
![showcase of miscellaneous tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84b9e68856bd3b3dcbcfc3e9ed7b7fb9c69899d.png)
